name: &GThe Wardome Preparation Room&n
description:
Here you can prepare yourself for the battle... Only begginers stay here. You will pass the first level here and after this, will be transfered for the Battle WarDome.
There's a SIGN here.
&GTO START TYPE: INFO&n

extra_descriptions.description: This zone only have 20 rooms. You will only pass the first level here, and after the level, you will finally enter the Wardome.
